name: RelationshipActualsOperationContracts
description: Typed transfer, refund, relationship, and exact channel-neutral actuals contracts including independent dimensions, hierarchy roll-ups, reconciliation state, and authoritative corrections.
schema_def: Transfer confirm/revoke/replace and refund confirm/revoke/replace retain explicit roles, reason, idempotency, active-role exclusivity, exact conservation, and exact full-refund equality. Refund confirmation requires an active negative original outflow and positive credit on the same owned account in ZAR with equal absolute minor-unit amounts; it rejects partial, over-refund, unmatched, inactive, and duplicate-role attempts without mutation. relationship.get returns immutable detail and lifecycle history. Statement correction may explicitly replace an active relationship only if substituting the new transaction preserves every invariant; otherwise the correction returns review-required and changes no financial effect. actuals.query filters account/date, categoryIds with exact|subtree scope, pools including unassigned, instruments/cardholders including unknown, evidence/reconciliation/relationship/categorization/lifecycle states, and groups none|pool|category_direct|category_subtree|pool_category. Result returns ordered items, exact netAccountMovement/externalSpend/budgetActual, direct and ancestry roll-ups, groups, cursor, expiry, snapshotId. Each active event contributes once; subtree membership never duplicates. Refunds follow explicit dimensions; transfer principal is zero spend. Statement correction excludes the superseded fact and includes the replacement exactly once. Cash treatment is gated by OQ-LEDGER-16. Stable errors cover hierarchy/filter, unresolved cash policy, cursor, busy, relationship review, and financial invariants.
